summary: Tested all 3 new features: troop type removal from setup, EN/RU language toggle, and season week auto-detection. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: External site cpt-hedge.com unreachable - week shows 'WEEK NOT DETECTED' / 'НЕДЕЛЯ НЕ ОПРЕДЕЛЕНА'. Expected behavior per spec (graceful failure), but worth monitoring.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) No troop type dropdown in setup - PASS. (2) Three free-form squads SQUAD 1 PRIMARY / SQUAD 2 SECONDARY / SQUAD 3 SUPPORT - PASS. (3) All hero dropdowns show all heroes (not type-locked) - PASS. (4) Troop type inferred as TANK from Murphy/DVA/Swift in Squad 1 - PASS. (5) localStorage profile includes troopType field - PASS. (6) EN/RU toggle visible with data-testid lang-en-btn / lang-ru-btn - PASS. (7) RU switches UI to Russian (ЗАДАЙТЕ ВОПРОС СОВЕТНИКУ, etc.) - PASS. (8) EN switches back to English - PASS. (9) Season week auto-detection runs on load (shows WEEK NOT DETECTED gracefully due to external site down) - PASS. (10) REFRESH button visible and clickable - PASS. (11) 6 quick action buttons visible in both languages - PASS (7 including ATTACH button). (12) Counter intel beats/weak labels also translated to Russian (ПОБЕЖДАЕТ/УЯЗВИМ) - bonus.
test_credentials: None required - app uses localStorage only
